raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Home-sharing offers a cost-effective solution to address the severe housing shortage in California.",
    "AB 474 is designed to benefit low-income older adults by helping them afford rising housing costs.",
    "Homeowners can supplement their income by participating in home-sharing programs.",
    "Renters can find affordable housing through nonprofit home-sharing programs.",
    "The Home-Sharing Act of 2025 provides incentives to make home-sharing a viable option for Californians.",
    "Low-income homeowners are exempt from paying income tax on rental earnings under the proposed bill.",
    "Home-sharing income does not affect eligibility for government assistance programs as per the provisions of AB 474.",
    "The bill strengthens tenant protections for individuals participating in home-sharing arrangements.",
    "The Home-Sharing Act guarantees the right for home-sharers to have a caregiver move in if needed.",
    "Expanding the availability of bedrooms for rent through home-sharing programs can help prevent homelessness."
